code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have = false
mut best_val = 0
mut best_abs = 0

while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i < n
    mut sign = 1
    let first = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if first == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if first == 43
      i = i + 1
    end

    mut num = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end

    let val = num * sign
    let av = if val < 0
      -val
    else
      val
    end

    if not have
      best_val = val
      best_abs = av
      have = true
    else if av < best_abs
      best_val = val
      best_abs = av
    end
  end
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
